In General…
▪ 	Horses for courses… there is no one solution
▪ 	They keep getting better, but no tool is perfect…
▪ 	EVERYONE is always looking for a better solution…
▪ 	Moving solutions isn’t pleasant (but it’s doable)
▪ 	They all have their own tutorials…

Email List Management
▪ 	Aweber
▪ 	I used this one for 10 + years
▪ 	Great service, great deliverability

▪ 	ConvertKit
▪ 	I really like what I’m hearing about this one
▪ 	http://productlaunchformula.com/convertkit
▪ 	Mailchimp
▪ 	You could start here, but I’m not a huge fan
▪ 	Don’t love the terms of service…

List Management & Shopping Cart
Both of these options offer integrated list management, shopping cart,
affiliate management
▪ 	Infusionsoft
▪ 	A completely integrated list management, shopping cart, affiliate
management
▪ 	Extremely powerful
▪ 	This is what we use
▪ 	http://productlaunchformula.com/infusionsoft
▪ 	Ontraport
▪ 	Similar to Infusionsoft in power and features
